forumDetails.reply: Yes, you are correct! The app does not appear in the Homey Apps section without the “Test” designation. The link you provided for the main app (https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/) is current

It appears that your device has been identified with a fingerprint, and it is supported by the "diy_custom_zigbee" driver. This driver is typically used for devices that may not have a specific driver

It looks like the ZG-102Z contact sensor is indeed recognized in our fingerprint database, and it should be supported by the "contact_sensor" driver. Since you mentioned that it previously worked in v
